Current state:
- Green N container: 5 pixels (shrunk), red dot at (10, 28)
- Yellow Y container: 14 pixels (shrunk), red dot at (31, 10)
- Green cross: center at (10, 52)
- Yellow cross: center at (52, 10)
I've tried all 4 combinations of expanded/shrunk. Let me think about what else could be the goal.
Wait, I just realized something. The red dots are at:
- Green red dot: (10, 28) when shrunk, (10, 31) when expanded
- Yellow red dot: (31, 10) when shrunk, (34, 10) when expanded
The cross pattern centers are:
- Green cross: (10, 52)
- Yellow cross: (52, 10)
What if the goal is to have the red dots at positions that are EQUIDISTANT from the cross pattern centers?
- Green expanded, yellow expanded: (10, 31) and (34, 10)
  - Green to green cross: 52 - 31 = 21
  - Yellow to yellow cross: 52 - 34 = 18
  - Not equal
- Green shrunk, yellow shrunk: (10, 28) and (31, 10)
  - Green to green cross: 52 - 28 = 24
  - Yellow to yellow cross: 52 - 31 = 21
  - Not equal
- Green expanded, yellow shrunk: (10, 31) and (31, 10)
  - Green to green cross: 52 - 31 = 21
  - Yellow to yellow cross: 52 - 31 = 21
  - EQUAL!
- Green shrunk, yellow expanded: (10, 28) and (34, 10)
  - Green to green cross: 52 - 28 = 24
  - Yellow to yellow cross: 52 - 34 = 18
  - Not equal
So the only combination where the distances are equal is green expanded, yellow shrunk. Let me try this!
Current state: green shrunk (5 pixels), yellow shrunk (14 pixels).
I need to expand the green container. Click on the RIGHT green U-shape at (21, 45).
